ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the race event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race event */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group or category of the race */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the race is held */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., practice, qualifying, main event) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racers" (
  "racer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racer */,
  "racer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the racer */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the racer represents */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle used by the racer (e.g., Car, Motorcycle) */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver linked to the racer */,
  "vehicle_number" INTEGER /* Number of the vehicle used by the racer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("racer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racers_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laps" (
  "lap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lap entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "racer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racer */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number within the race */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the lap */,
  "lap_speed" REAL /* Speed achieved during the lap */,
  "sector_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete each sector */,
  "sector_speed" REAL /* Speed achieved in each sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laps_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laps_racer_id FOREIGN KEY ("racer_id") REFERENCES racers ("racer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing team */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "team_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Team website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event log entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race related to the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., crash, penalty, weather change) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the event occurred */,
  "event_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the race */,
  "event_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the race track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in miles */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of track (e.g., Oval, Road Course) */,
  "track_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the track */,
  "track_map" TEXT /* Visual representation of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "years_active" INTEGER /* Number of years the driver has been active */,
  "driver_biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the driver */,
  "driver_image" TEXT /* Image of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "racer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racer */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race related to the metrics */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed achieved by the racer in the race */,
  "best_time" REAL /* Best time recorded by the racer */,
  "worst_time" REAL /* Worst time recorded by the racer */,
  "average_sector_time" REAL /* Average time taken to complete each sector */,
  "average_sector_speed" REAL /* Average speed achieved in each sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_racer_id FOREIGN KEY ("racer_id") REFERENCES racers ("racer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team member, official, spectator) */,
  "user_biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_image" TEXT /* Image of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
